description: Instantly acknowledges web form submissions with personalized emails, creates lead records, notifies team members, and routes leads to appropriate assignees.
outcome: Respond to every website inquiry within seconds. Never miss a lead. Automatic team routing.

configurable_settings.label: Days until follow-up task is due

templates.subject: We received your {{form_name}} request
New Lead: {{submitter_name}} ({{form_name}})

test_matrix.happy_path: Form submitted → Email reply sent within 2 seconds → Lead created → Assigned → Task created → Assignee notified
test_matrix.missing_capability: Email not configured → activation fails → user guided to email setup
test_matrix.duplicate_email: Form from existing customer email → Lead updated instead of created → Original lead preserved
test_matrix.assignment_failure: Assignment fails → lead still created → admin notified → manual routing required
test_matrix.offline_submission: Form submitted outside business hours → Reply still sent immediately → Task created for next business day
test_matrix.rate_limit: Multiple forms in quick succession → Queue processed → Each gets reply with slight delay

downgrade_behavior: Module disabled. Existing leads preserved. Auto-replies stopped immediately. Unassigned leads remain in queue.

documentation.setup_guide: Configure native forms or connect website form endpoints. Choose lead assignment method. Customize reply email template and task settings.
known_limitations: Assignment strategy depends on available team members
Cannot reply to forms without email field
documentation.support_runbook: Check email service status → verify form endpoints → confirm CRM integration → test with sample form
